infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take photos of medicines and prescriptions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to upload health records and medicine images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find nearby doctors and clinics.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for video consultations.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Medicine Reminder to use your location to find nearby doctors.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you upload health records and medicine images.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Medicine Reminder to access your camera to take photos of medicines and prescriptions.
